name: Party Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pie filling mix, 2/3 cup sugar, and 1/4 cup water in a saucepan.
2. Blend in egg yolks and remaining water.
3. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture comes to a full rolling boil.
4. Remove from heat and blend in lemon juice and butter.
5. Allow to cool for 5 minutes, stirring twice.
6. Pour into pie shell.
7. Beat egg whites until foamy throughout.
8. Gradually beat in 6 tablespoons sugar and continue beating until the mixture forms shiny peaks.
9. Spread over pie filling.
10. Bake at 425 degrees for 5 to 10 minutes or until meringue is delicately brown.
11. Cool at least 4 hours before cutting.
